_comment: Pinned toolchain versions bundled into Veriscode installers. Update deliberately, not automatically - a bad Verible/Icarus build should never silently ship.

verible._assets_comment: win32-arm64 is intentionally absent - Verible ships no native Windows-on-ARM build, so toolchain.ts's resolveBinary() falls back to win32-x64 there, which runs transparently under Windows 11's x64 emulation (Prism). The single macOS asset below is used for both Mac arches for the same reason, in case it isn't already a universal2 binary.
